mapper.select: SELECT t1.area_code as areaCode, t1.country_code as countryCode, t1.max_length as maxLength, t1.min_length as minLength, t2.country_name as countryName, t1.icon as icon FROM `area_site_manage` t1, area_country_name t2 WHERE t1.area_code = t2.area_code AND t1.site_code = #{siteCode} AND t1.status = #{status} AND t2.`language` = #{language}
